use_cases: Display subscription tier options with visual hierarchy
Compare pricing plans side-by-side for conversion optimization
Showcase feature tiers with decorative animated elements
Present pricing breakdowns with bold geometric styling
Highlight recommended pricing plan with visual emphasis
ai_summary: A neobrutalist-styled animated pricing card system featuring bold geometric SVG decorations (waves and crosses) with thick dark strokes. The component provides a wrapper structure for displaying subscription tiers, pricing comparisons, and feature breakdowns. Includes decorative wave and cross SVG elements that can be animated to create visual interest and guide user attention to pricing information. Designed for SaaS and e-commerce platforms needing compelling pricing displays.
